name: Kitasan Black | The Most Wanted.
description:
"Trainer! Now is my turn to ask you for help!"

Even if her SSR card is wanted for everyone, Kitasan Black is more than a meta-changing card on a game. She is a leader, a sweet and cheerful guide, who brings respect and devotion from the other horse-girls of the Team Spica. And as your right hand, you two work together in helping other Umas reach their dreams.

But now, she is not the source of confidence, strength and speed that everyone loves, but a girl in need of help. And who can help her, more than you, her trainer?
creator: Kassinho
